item.text:
The repository root contains:

- Directories: `.git`, `docs`, `scripts`, `src`
- Files: `package.json`, `README.md`, `tsconfig.json`

This looks like a small TypeScript/Node repo with source code in `src`, supporting scripts in `scripts`, and documentation in `docs`.
